pilot_signal_strength.note: Cross-domain absorption measured (28.6% city-continent vs 42.9% first-letter at L24); layer-dependent variation confirmed; cross-domain difference NOT significant (p=0.255); activation patching REVERSED; H8 falsified (0% benign). Mixed signals but core characterization valid.

hypothesis_survival.note: H1 partially supported. H2' contradicted at L24 (first-letter highest). H3 suggestive. H7 REVERSED for cross-domain. H8 FALSIFIED. H9 NOT SUPPORTED. Only probe quality + negative results clearly delivered.

path_to_full_result.note: Clear path: expand to 4 hierarchies, improve probes, matched methodology for patching. 8.5 GPU-hours. Infrastructure fully operational from 8 prior iterations.

novelty.note: Novelty 8/10 confirmed. No competing cross-domain work. Even reversed findings are novel and publishable.

resource_efficiency.note: 8.5 GPU-hours total, inference-only, pilot ran in ~20 minutes.

hypothesis_survival.note: Activation patching reversal undermines encoder-level competitive exclusion premise.

path_to_full_result.note: Feasible (1-2 GPU-hours) but requires implementing OMP encoding from scratch.

hypothesis_survival.note: Core premise (cos_sim x co_occur predicts absorption) not supported.

path_to_full_result.note: CPU-only analysis on Phase 1 data. Needs expanded pair count.

novelty.note: 9/10. Zero prior work on ecological competition in SAEs.

hypothesis_survival.note: 100% pathological absorption suggests correction would be valuable if feasible.

path_to_full_result.note: Clear method but depends on Phase 1 absorption identification.

reasons: Core contribution (cross-domain absorption characterization) remains novel and valid regardless of hypothesis direction -- no competing work exists as of April 2026
Cross-domain absorption variation confirmed: 0% (Africa) to 100% (Europe) within city-continent alone; first-letter shows dramatic layer-dependence (5% at L6-L18 to 43% at L24)
Negative results and reversals (H7 reversed, H8 falsified at 0% benign, H9 not supported) are themselves publishable findings that strengthen the paper's evidence-driven narrative
Infrastructure fully operational from 8 prior iterations; full experiment requires only 8.5 GPU-hours
Probe quality sufficient at L24 (first-letter F1=0.928, city-continent F1=0.871) with clear path to expand to city-country and city-language
risks_identified: H2' contradiction at L24 (first-letter highest absorption, not lowest) requires reframing the paper's central narrative from 'semantic > syntactic' to 'absorption is hierarchy-AND-layer-dependent'
Activation patching reversal on cross-domain (0.05% child recovery vs 14.4% control) contradicts iter_008 result -- needs matched-methodology replication on BOTH hierarchies
Cross-domain difference not statistically significant at N=2 hierarchies (p=0.255) -- expanding to 4 hierarchies is critical for the primary contribution
100% pathological absorption (0% benign) may limit the paper's diagnostic contribution to a negative result rather than a new classification tool
Rate-distortion predictors all non-significant (best rho=-0.249) -- Phase 3 contribution likely becomes appendix material
mandatory_revisions: Reframe H2' from 'semantic > syntactic' to 'absorption rates are hierarchy-AND-layer-dependent; no single hierarchy is worst case at all layers'
Test activation patching on BOTH first-letter (to replicate iter_008) and city-continent (to confirm reversal) with matched methodology
Report H8 falsification (0% benign, 100% pathological) as a finding that strengthens the case for studying absorption, not as a failure
Train city-country and city-language probes immediately -- these are critical path for statistical power
Report L24 first-letter anomaly (5% to 43% jump) as a layer-dependence finding worthy of its own analysis
next_actions: Train city-country and city-language probes at layers 6, 12, 18, 24 (Phase 1.1 completion)
Run cross-domain absorption measurement across all 4 hierarchies at L24 and L12 where probes pass gate
Complete hedging decomposition and architecture comparison with 4 hierarchies
Re-run activation patching on first-letter (replicate iter_008) and city-continent (confirm reversal) with matched methodology
Run benign/pathological diagnostic on first-letter to compare with city-continent (100% pathological) result
Rate-distortion predictors with expanded pair count (target >= 30 pairs from 4 hierarchies)
Negative results documentation and final consolidation

H1_cross_domain_variation.evidence: Rates differ (28.6% vs 42.9%) but permutation test p=0.255 not significant at N=2 hierarchies

H2_semantic_gt_syntactic.evidence: First-letter (42.9%) > city-continent (28.6%) at L24_16k, reversing earlier iterations. Layer-dependent.

H3_hedging_decomposition.evidence: City-continent 90.9% compensatory vs first-letter 66.7%, Fisher p=0.131 (underpowered)

H4_GAS_detector.evidence: rho=0.12 (prior iteration). Documented as negative result.

H5_absorption_tax.evidence: T(G) ranking matches at L24 with 2 hierarchies (trivially). R_pc-absorption rho=0.406 (p=0.095).

H6_architecture_generalization.evidence: L12 probes too poor for reliable comparison. No clear architecture winner.

H7_causal_activation_patching.evidence: City-continent: 0.05% child recovery vs 14.4% control (wrong direction). iter_008 first-letter: 14.3% child vs 0.5% control. Hierarchy-dependent.

H8_benign_pathological.evidence: 100% pathological at all thresholds (0.05, 0.1, 0.2). Mean logit change = -3.99. N=1464 instances.

H9_rate_distortion_predictors.evidence: Three-factor model rho=0.261 (p=0.266). No individual predictor significant. N=20 pairs.

evaluator_notes: Despite multiple hypothesis reversals and falsifications, ADVANCE is warranted because: (1) the core contribution is characterization, not confirmation of specific predictions; (2) negative results and reversals are themselves publishable and strengthen the evidence-driven narrative; (3) the novelty of cross-domain absorption measurement is uncontested; (4) the infrastructure is fully operational. Confidence is 0.68 rather than higher because the cross-domain difference lacks statistical significance at N=2 hierarchies -- expanding to 4 hierarchies is the critical path for the primary contribution.
